speaker: agent
text: Apex Health member services, this is Tom. How can I help you today?

speaker: customer
text: Hi Tom, I sprained my ankle three days ago and it's still really swollen. Can I see a specialist?

speaker: agent
text: I'm sorry to hear that. Let's get you sorted. Member ID first?

speaker: agent
text: Thank you. And your date of birth?

speaker: customer
text: July 2nd, 1995.

speaker: agent
text: You're verified. For a sprain, that would be an orthopedic specialist.

speaker: customer
text: Right, that's what I figured. Are any in network nearby?

speaker: agent
text: Let me check the orthopedic providers near your ZIP.

speaker: agent
text: Okay, there's Coastal Orthopedics about two miles out, in network on your plan.

speaker: customer
text: Perfect, can I just book directly?

speaker: agent
text: You can. You won't need a referral since you're on the PPO.

speaker: customer
text: Oh good. How soon should I be seen for swelling like this?

speaker: agent
text: For persistent swelling after three days, I'd recommend within the next day or two.

speaker: customer
text: Okay. Should I go to urgent care instead if it's faster?

speaker: agent
text: Urgent care is also covered if you can't get an orthopedic appointment quickly.

speaker: customer
text: Got it. I'll call Coastal first.

speaker: agent
text: Great. I'll text you their number and your copay details now.

speaker: customer
text: Just got the text, thank you.

speaker: agent
text: You're welcome. I hope the ankle feels better soon.

speaker: customer
text: Thanks Tom, really appreciate it.

speaker: agent
text: Take care, and don't hesitate to call back.
